steps: Contact RBC Investor Services to report the overpayment of CAD 4,077.00 on BMO dividend payment - custodian under-withheld tax (applied 13.5% vs. treaty rate of 15%)
Request RBC to remit the excess CAD 4,077.00 to Canada Revenue Agency as additional withholding tax on behalf of CLIENT08
Obtain confirmation from RBC that the corrected 15% withholding tax rate per CA-NO treaty has been applied and excess funds transferred to CRA
Update CLIENT08 records to reflect correct net dividend amount of CAD 231,030.00 per treaty entitlement

references.title: CRA – Rates for Part XIII Tax (WHT rates & treaty reduction)
